When looking for a plumber, there are two types of businesses: The first is the small family-owned type operation that employs mostly the same reliable people from year to year. The second is a big operation where you recognize the name through heavy advertising on the sides of buses and a large fleet of service vans. The former works on repeat business and customer loyalty. reviews_json: ["Sean did a fantastic job applying graphene ceramic coating our SUV. He came to our home and did the work, so we were able to see the progress all day. We got a number of bids and felt Sean's was very price competitive. Our SUV looks brand new again, and the coating should last 5 years before needing to be reapplied with basic care. Snow and ice will roll off very easily now. We won't have to wash it as often and will only need the quick, touchless self-service car wash. We are told we don't even have to dry it. The coating resists spots.
